sourcesContent:
import {useState, useEffect} from 'react'; export default function Navbar() { const [isShrunk, setIsShrunk] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const handleScroll = () => { // Mengecilkan navbar jika scroll lebih dari 50px setIsShrunk(window.scrollY > 50); }; window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); }, []); return (
